title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
